option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Traveling
## Etat actuel (Sprint 2 - TravelShare)
Cette base implemente un socle `TravelShare` en Java avec mode anonyme/connecte mock:
- footer 5 onglets: Home, Recherche, Messages, Ajouter, Itineraire - bouton global en haut a gauche: `Connexion` (anonyme) ou `Profil` (connecte) - feed Home + recherche texte avec donnees mock en memoire - ouverture d'une fiche detail post depuis Home/Recherche - interactions en detail: like/unlike, signalement, commentaire (connecte uniquement) - placeholders pour Messages, Ajouter et Itineraire (pont TravelPath)
## Structure
- `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/domain`: modeles et contrats repository - `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/data`: repositories mock (posts + session) - `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/ui`: ecrans TravelShare
## Lancer les tests unitaires
```bash ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest ```
## Prochaines etapes suggerees
- ecran publication complet (image + texte + partage public/groupe) - messagerie privee (DM + groupes) - notifications mock par auteur/lieu/tag - migration data source JSON -> base locale/API

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Traveling
## Etat actuel (Sprint 3.1 - TravelShare)
Cette base implemente un socle `TravelShare` en Java avec mode anonyme/connecte mock:
- footer 5 onglets: Home, Recherche, Messages, Ajouter, Itineraire - bouton global en haut a gauche: `Connexion` (anonyme) ou `Profil` (connecte) - feed Home + recherche texte avec donnees mock en memoire - ouverture d'une fiche detail post depuis Home/Recherche - interactions en detail: like/unlike, signalement, commentaire (connecte uniquement) - onglet `Ajouter` fonctionnel: creation de post (lieu, periode, description, comment y aller) - publication reservee au mode connecte, avec ajout immediat en tete du feed - placeholders pour Messages et Itineraire (pont TravelPath)
## Structure
- `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/domain`: modeles et contrats repository - `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/data`: repositories mock (posts + session) - `app/src/main/java/com/example/traveling/travelshare/ui`: ecrans TravelShare
## Lancer les tests unitaires
```bash ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest ```
## Prochaines etapes suggerees
- ecran publication avec image/galerie - messagerie privee (DM + groupes) - notifications mock par auteur/lieu/tag - migration data source JSON -> base locale/API

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_placeholder" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.BodyMedium" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_subtitle" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.BodyMedium" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_location_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_location_hint" android:inputType="textCapWords" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_period_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_period_hint" android:inputType="textCapWords" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_description_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_description_hint" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_how_to_input" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:hint="@string/travelshare_add_how_to_hint" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
<Button android:id="@+id/travelshare_add_publish_button" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/travelshare_add_publish" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Traveling</string>
<string name="travelshare_nav_home">Home</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_search">Recherche</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_messages">Messages</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_add">Ajouter</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_itinerary">Itineraire</string>
<string name="travelshare_auth_login">Connexion</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_profile">Profil</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_title">Connexion TravelShare</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_username_hint">Nom voyageur</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_login_success">Connecte en tant que %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_logout">Deconnexion</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_logout_success">Deconnecte, mode anonyme actif</string>
<string name="travelshare_profile_title">Mon profil</string> <string name="travelshare_profile_name_label">Compte actif</string>
<string name="travelshare_home_title">TravelShare</string> <string name="travelshare_home_subtitle">Decouverte de posts de voyage (mock)</string> <string name="travelshare_home_post_clicked">Post de %1$s a %2$s</string>
<string name="travelshare_search_title">Recherche</string> <string name="travelshare_search_hint">Lieu, auteur, mot-cle...</string> <string name="travelshare_search_button">Chercher</string>
<string name="travelshare_messages_title">Messages</string> <string name="travelshare_messages_placeholder">DM et groupes prives arrives a la prochaine etape.</string>
<string name="travelshare_add_title">Ajouter un post</string> <string name="travelshare_add_placeholder">Creation de post (photo, texte, tags) a la prochaine etape.</string>
<string name="travelshare_itinerary_title">Itineraire</string> <string name="travelshare_itinerary_placeholder">Passerelle TravelPath a connecter en dernier.</string>
<string name="travelshare_post_title_format">%1$s - %2$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_period_format">Periode: %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_how_to_format">Comment y aller: %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_social_preview">Likes %1$d | Com %2$d</string> <string name="travelshare_post_social_detail">Likes %1$d | Commentaires %2$d | Reports %3$d</string> <string name="travelshare_post_not_found">Post introuvable</string>
<string name="travelshare_action_like">Like</string> <string name="travelshare_action_unlike">Unlike</string> <string name="travelshare_action_report">Signaler</string> <string name="travelshare_action_comment">Commenter</string>
<string name="travelshare_comment_hint">Ajouter un commentaire</string> <string name="travelshare_comment_need_login">Connecte-toi pour commenter</string> <string name="travelshare_comment_added">Commentaire ajoute. Total: %1$d</string> <string name="travelshare_report_done">Signalement envoye. Total: %1$d</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Traveling</string>
<string name="travelshare_nav_home">Home</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_search">Recherche</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_messages">Messages</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_add">Ajouter</string> <string name="travelshare_nav_itinerary">Itineraire</string>
<string name="travelshare_auth_login">Connexion</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_profile">Profil</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_title">Connexion TravelShare</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_username_hint">Nom voyageur</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_login_success">Connecte en tant que %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_logout">Deconnexion</string> <string name="travelshare_auth_logout_success">Deconnecte, mode anonyme actif</string>
<string name="travelshare_profile_title">Mon profil</string> <string name="travelshare_profile_name_label">Compte actif</string>
<string name="travelshare_home_title">TravelShare</string> <string name="travelshare_home_subtitle">Decouverte de posts de voyage (mock)</string> <string name="travelshare_home_post_clicked">Post de %1$s a %2$s</string>
<string name="travelshare_search_title">Recherche</string> <string name="travelshare_search_hint">Lieu, auteur, mot-cle...</string> <string name="travelshare_search_button">Chercher</string>
<string name="travelshare_messages_title">Messages</string> <string name="travelshare_messages_placeholder">DM et groupes prives arrives a la prochaine etape.</string>
<string name="travelshare_add_title">Ajouter un post</string> <string name="travelshare_add_subtitle">Publie un nouveau souvenir de voyage</string> <string name="travelshare_add_location_hint">Lieu</string> <string name="travelshare_add_period_hint">Periode (ex: Ete 2026)</string> <string name="travelshare_add_description_hint">Description</string> <string name="travelshare_add_how_to_hint">Comment y aller</string> <string name="travelshare_add_publish">Publier</string> <string name="travelshare_add_need_login">Connecte-toi pour publier un post</string> <string name="travelshare_add_need_login_cta">Connexion requise</string> <string name="travelshare_add_publish_success">Post publie dans ton feed</string>
<string name="travelshare_itinerary_title">Itineraire</string> <string name="travelshare_itinerary_placeholder">Passerelle TravelPath a connecter en dernier.</string>
<string name="travelshare_post_title_format">%1$s - %2$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_period_format">Periode: %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_how_to_format">Comment y aller: %1$s</string> <string name="travelshare_post_social_preview">Likes %1$d | Com %2$d</string> <string name="travelshare_post_social_detail">Likes %1$d | Commentaires %2$d | Reports %3$d</string> <string name="travelshare_post_not_found">Post introuvable</string>
<string name="travelshare_action_like">Like</string> <string name="travelshare_action_unlike">Unlike</string> <string name="travelshare_action_report">Signaler</string> <string name="travelshare_action_comment">Commenter</string>
<string name="travelshare_comment_hint">Ajouter un commentaire</string> <string name="travelshare_comment_need_login">Connecte-toi pour commenter</string> <string name="travelshare_comment_added">Commentaire ajoute. Total: %1$d</string> <string name="travelshare_report_done">Signalement envoye. Total: %1$d</string> </resources>
